name: cyd
description: Download and ingest SEC 10-K/20-F/8-K cybersecurity (cyd:) iXBRL disclosures from the EDGAR Financial Statement and Notes Data Sets into SQLite.

scripts.refresh: npm run fetch && npm run ingest && npm run marketcap && npm run export && npm run incidents
scripts.build:site: tsx src/cli.ts export && tsx src/cli.ts incidents && tsx src/cli.ts site
scripts.dev: tsx src/cli.ts site && python3 -m http.server 8000 --directory dist
